data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis): (1) Gate 2c adds a primary signal to the gate signal accumulator — it does NOT independently block the fix. Story a2f0-9641 (escalation routing) handles the routing decision based on total signal count. (2) Diff source: Gate 2c receives the working tree diff (git diff after fix sub-agent writes changes, before commit). Specify in SKILL.md: pipe output of 'git diff -- <test-files>' to the script. (3) Exact placement: Gate 2c runs after fix implementation (Step 6) and before verification (Step 7), as Step 6.5.
